import { AppLayout, ChatWindow, Sidebar } from './index.ts'; // Initialize the full DevForge app with sidebar and chat const appContainer = document.getElementById('app'); if (appContainer) { const layout = AppLayout.create({ showSidebar: true }); appContainer.appendChild(layout); // Add a ChatWindow to the main content area const mainSection = layout.querySelector('.main-section'); if (mainSection) { const chatWindow = ChatWindow.create(); // Clear any existing content and add the chat window mainSection.innerHTML = ''; mainSection.appendChild(chatWindow); } }
